## Next Steps

```{python}
checklist = context.get("todo", [])
if not checklist:
    checklist = [
        "Review the automatically generated sections and refine the narrative.",
        "Add experimental design details (sample prep, acquisition, QC).",
        "Summarise key biological insights and hypotheses.",
    ]
for item in checklist:
    emit_markdown(f"- {item}")
```
